overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through the Pacifica district. The player emerges from a dark underpass into a bright, sunlit coastal amusement park area featuring the 'Mega Ride' Ferris wheel and the 'Caliente' building, with palm trees and futuristic architecture visible throughout the abandoned entertainment complex.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the dark concrete underpass toward the bright exit ahead

entered.detail: massive concrete ceiling and walls creating a dark tunnel environment
tall curved street light pole silhouetted against the bright exit
modern glass facade building visible through the tunnel exit
modern glass and steel structure on the right side of the tunnel
large white Ferris wheel becoming visible in the distance at the tunnel exit

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk through a dark, enclosed concrete underpass. The camera moves steadily forward toward a bright exit where a Ferris wheel is visible in the distance. The environment is dimly lit with artificial light, and modern glass buildings frame the tunnel exit ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with restaurants and entertainment venues

events.description: exiting the dark covered underpass into bright sunlit urban street
turning right to follow the street alongside the Caliente building

agents.ego_description: exiting the tunnel into bright sunlight and proceeding along the street, passing the orange Caliente restaurant building

entered.detail: circular building with large orange neon CALIENTE signage
large white geometric dome structure behind the Caliente building
tall palm trees lining the left side of the street
black curved street lamp post on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges from the dark tunnel into a bright, sunlit commercial street. To the right stands the distinctive orange Caliente building with its neon signage, while the massive Mega Ride Ferris wheel dominates the left side of the frame. The camera turns right and proceeds along the asphalt street lined with palm trees and parked vehicles.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned amusement park with Mega Ride Ferris wheel and coastal boardwalk

events.description: turning left from commercial street into the open amusement park plaza beneath the Ferris wheel
approaching the coastal boardwalk with sandy beach and ocean becoming visible

agents.ego_description: turning left into the amusement park area and walking beneath the massive Mega Ride structure toward the coastal boardwalk

entered.detail: large metal framework sign spelling MEGA RIDE suspended above the Ferris wheel
red and white roller coaster tracks surrounding the Ferris wheel structure
derelict food vendor stalls with metal shutters and weathered signage
large red billboard displaying cybernetic body modification advertisements
multi-story concrete parking structure with purple neon accents
sandy beach area visible beyond the boardwalk edge

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left into a wide-open abandoned amusement park plaza dominated by the massive Mega Ride Ferris wheel and its overhead signage. The ground transitions to patterned concrete tiles as the camera moves past derelict food stalls and billboards. In the distance, a coastal parking garage and sandy beach become visible as the camera approaches the waterfront boardwalk area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from the oppressive shadows of a concrete underpass into the expansive, sun-drenched ruins of a coastal amusement park. It begins by moving steadily through a dimly lit tunnel, where artificial light fades as the camera pushes toward a bright exit framed by modern glass buildings. As the camera emerges into the blinding sunlight, the scene opens onto a commercial street featuring the orange Caliente building and the towering Mega Ride Ferris wheel, before turning right along an asphalt road lined with palm trees. The perspective then shifts left, transitioning from the street onto patterned concrete tiles as the camera wanders past derelict food stalls and billboards. Finally, the environment expands into a wide-open plaza, moving toward a distant coastal parking garage and the sandy shoreline of the waterfront boardwalk.
